## Parent
Reference: PORTFOLIO_V2_PRD.md

## What to build
Implement CSS custom properties for the dark theme color palette and apply them to basic components. The theme should use dark gray (#1d1e2b) as base with accent colors #54AECC, #5472CC, #7254CC for interactive elements.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] CSS custom properties defined in `src/styles/theme.css`
- [ ] Color variables: `--bg-primary: #1d1e2b`, `--color-1: #54AECC`, `--color-2: #5472CC`, `--color-3: #7254CC`
- [ ] Additional theme variables for text, borders, shadows
- [ ] Basic components (Container, Button, Text) styled with theme variables
- [ ] Color palette visible in browser DevTools
- [ ] Theme applied consistently across all existing components
- [ ] No hardcoded colors in component styles

## Blocked by
- Issue #001 (Setup Ocean Background)
